checkpoint.contextAtWrite: Session: P14 trace production gap diagnosed + S8-S13 corpus design spec written. P14 root cause: PRs #53-55 changed trace-commit.yml to push to 'traces' branch instead of master; improvement-agent-schedule.yml reads workspace/traces/ on master only; secondary issue is no trace writer in assurance-gate.yml generates new JSONL per PR. Full diagnosis at workspace/platform-audit/trace-gap-diagnosis-2026-05-16.md. S8-S13 design spec at workspace/handoffs/pipeline-corpus-S8-S13-design.md — 6 scenarios designed (S8: reporting pipeline, S9: KYC onboarding, S10: core banking migration, S11: CDR consent API, S12: AI model retraining, S13: trans-Tasman payments). Design spec awaiting operator confirmation before full operator briefs written.
